title: Neighborhood Content Shield
canonical_topic: A multi-layered content validation and enforcement system preventing member-customizable neighborhood spaces from circumventing platform rules via regex pattern matching, database triggers, CSS sandboxing, immutable rule display, and Harper Guild review workflows.
composing_primitives: Prohibited Patterns Registry with severity levels

title: Opt-In Member Documentation with Benefits
canonical_topic: A cooperative membership architecture in which documentation of member contributions is strictly opt-in and paired with a graduated benefits bundle (named attribution, co-authorship credit, SAA accrual legibility, research-layer eligibility, durable public record), preserving full membership rights for non-opting members without creating a two-tier system.
composing_primitives: Opt-In Consent Flow with explicit voluntariness disclosure

title: Member-Generated Guide Corpus
canonical_topic: A computer-implemented method for accumulating, indexing, and distributing a corpus of first-person operator-scale guides authored by cooperative members describing vessel-tier transitions, forming a distributed peer-to-peer training substrate indexed by rung, industry, and cooperative pathway with proximity-ranked retrieval.
composing_primitives: First-Person Operator Guide Corpus (from opt-in consent)
Open Water Integration for pre-Patron guide surfacing
Credit-Allocation for guides cited in successful transitions

title: The Hemispheric Protocol (Deterministic Calendar Deconfliction for Launch-Wave Response Handling)
canonical_topic: A deterministic deconfliction system for founder-level calendar management during high-volume outreach-response windows using pre-assigned tier-specific reservation grids, tier-opaque scheduling links distributed per counterparty category, graceful-recess collision handling, and physical contact-flow separation via computer-based VoIP.

title: ROM-First AI Inference Cost Architecture (The 70/25/5 Model)
canonical_topic: A computer-implemented method for serving AI inference workloads through a read-only-memory-first query pipeline achieving approximately 70% cache hit rate without frontier model invocation, 25% primary model routing, and 5% cross-reference verification, reducing blended per-query cost to 10-15% of naive all-inference pipelines.
composing_primitives: ROM Cache Layer with query normalization and fingerprinting

title: Algorithmic Efficiency Mandate as Grid Interconnection Compliance Layer
canonical_topic: A regulatory compliance architecture attaching a measurable minimum AI inference cache hit rate floor to existing large-load grid interconnection review processes, operating as a technology-neutral output standard without creating a new regulatory bureaucracy, and functioning as the policy lever that forces adoption of ROM-First AI inference at hyperscale.
composing_primitives: Algorithmic Efficiency Implementation Plan with Performance Bond
Annual Disclosure Rule for Cache-Hit-Rate Reporting
Preemption Provision as Alternative to Moratoriums

title: Affiliation Badge System (Shirley Temple Visibility)
canonical_topic: A unified group affiliation display system with category-based default visibility calibrated to discourse risk and two-sided member-controlled filters (publisher and viewer sides) that preserve full cooperative participation rights regardless of visibility settings.
composing_primitives: Group Affiliation Records with category classification
Two-Sided Publisher and Viewer Visibility Filters
Full Participation Rights Preservation (Marks, voting, feeds)

title: Pioneer Proposal Rewards (Rolodex Recruitment Pipeline)
canonical_topic: A diminishing-priority reward system for cooperative members who propose external parties to join the platform, distributing rewards on a diminishing sequence (100/50/25/10%) with independent time-decay, strict one-level-deep anti-MLM enforcement, pre-populated business plan template delivery, and automatic Rolodex connection on join.
composing_primitives: Automatic Rolodex Connection on Join Event

title: Helm Card Dashboard (Desktop Frame Grid, Three-Mode Display)
canonical_topic: A three-mode personal dashboard system rendering cooperative member Deck Cards as a categorized frame grid (TV Screens), full-viewport single card (Movie Theater), and mobile swipeable deck (Shuffleable Deck), with Keep-tier-gated progressive frame unlocking and simultaneous X-Ray diagnostic flip across all frames.
composing_primitives: Three Display Modes sharing DeckCardShell component
Chalk-Outline Progressive Discovery for unrevealed frames
Simultaneous X-Ray Diagnostic Flip across all visible cards

title: Catapult Power (Universal Momentum Metric)
canonical_topic: A universal momentum metric normalizing all cooperative platform progress thresholds into a single 0-100 scale (100 = escape velocity / launch) via a generated-column formula, enabling cross-system comparability across project backing, petitions, votes, and initiative launches through a single reusable visual gauge component.
composing_primitives: Catapult Metrics Database with generated-column CP score
Launch Event Trigger at CP=100 with entity-specific downstream actions

title: Mission Briefings (Role-Specific Informational Tours)
canonical_topic: A role-specific, repeatable informational tour system delivering N distinct briefings to a member with N active roles, each assembled from live catapult metric data via role-based templates and rendered as navigable submarine-door-sequence card pages, explicitly distinct from one-time onboarding experiences.
composing_primitives: Briefing Template Database with per-role catapult entity type sets
Role-Multiplied Delivery (N roles = N distinct briefings)
Live-Data Assembly from Catapult Metrics at request time
Auto-Refresh Flag for snapshot vs. live-data modes

title: Chess-Piece Librarian Doublets (Four Parallel Truth-Snapshot Pipelines)
canonical_topic: A computer-implemented architecture using four parallel ingestion pipelines with intentionally orthogonal biases (prose-semantic, schema-structure, numerical-statistical, provenance-citation) producing independent truth snapshots for pairwise triangulation, yielding diagnostic disagreement classification by drift type rather than mere drift detection.
composing_primitives: Four Orthogonal Ingestion Pipelines (Bishop/Knight/Rook/Pawn bias axes)
Pairwise Truth Snapshot Comparison across 4 pipelines
Diagnostic Disagreement Classification by drift type
Cooperative Governance Escalation for material disagreements

title: The Glove: MoneyPenny Multi-Channel Persona Layer
canonical_topic: A persona-consistent multi-channel interaction layer routing inbound cooperative member contact across Twilio SMS, email webhook, and on-site chat into a single ROM-first query pipeline with unified conversation state, persona continuity, and structural consent constraints prohibiting unsolicited outbound messaging.
composing_primitives: Unified MoneyPenny Persona and Conversation State
Consent-Gated Outbound Constraint (inbound-implicit vs. explicit opt-in)

title: Tower of Peace Base Interface (Three-Door Help Entry)
canonical_topic: A three-door help entry architecture routing cooperative member queries across Twilio SMS, email webhook, and web chat into a unified ROM-first query pipeline achieving 70% cache hit rate, making AI-backed member help economically viable within $5/year cooperative membership constraints.
composing_primitives: Cooperative Economics Viability Link ($5/yr membership compatible)

title: The Scrambler (Eager Pairwise Consistency Verification)
canonical_topic: A background process performing eager pairwise consistency verification across eight multi-agent platform subsystems using a deterministic non-sequential 28-cycle permutation (C(8,2)) with seeded 7-cycle rotation to prevent gaming, amortizing consistency-check cost with zero AI inference, writing results to an append-only divergence ledger.
composing_primitives: Append-Only Divergence Ledger with Severity Classification
Zero AI Inference Architecture (pure deterministic predicates)
tied_receipts: K407 production — 5 Python modules, 19/19 tests passing

title: The Cooperative Defensive Patent Pledge
canonical_topic: A three-part structured patent filing and licensing pattern for cooperatively-developed infrastructure: defensive filing to establish priority in friendly hands, perpetual royalty-free cooperative license codified in bylaws and irrevocable through ownership change, and defensive enforcement reserved against extractive commercial use with a patent retaliation clause.
composing_primitives: Defensive Patent Filing (priority in friendly hands)
Enumerated Cooperative Criteria as Licensee Gate
Patent Retaliation Clause (license terminates on suit)
Separate Commercial Licensing Layer for non-cooperative licensees
founder_voice_quotes: I AM patenting this, yes? Can I give it away through Liana Banyan, the way I am giving all the I.P. away, for the advantage of Members?

title: The Representative Scorecard (Power to the People, Literally)
canonical_topic: A cooperative-member-created, member-voted, data-backed persistent tracking artifact for elected representatives' actions on specific issues, combining automated external data ingestion, member consensus escalation thresholds, integration with the Political Expedition coordination layer, and cross-election-cycle persistence.
composing_primitives: Member Voting on Escalation Priority with Consensus Rating

title: The Glass Door (Public-by-Default Outreach with Member-Voted Dispatch)
canonical_topic: A cooperative governance method for a platform's outbound communications comprising public-by-default publication of every letter before dispatch, member voting with binding governance verdict gating dispatch via TouchStone predicate, a public response ledger with privacy-redaction rules, and a member-voted retraction and apology mechanism.
composing_primitives: Public Response Ledger with Redaction Rules
founder_voice_quotes: I want all of that published on Cephas from the start. So that if anyone looks, they can see the letter that I am GOING to send to those people, and on what day I am sending it. Because can't those also be voted on?

title: Triple-Redundant Verification Architecture for AI Coordination Systems
canonical_topic: A verification architecture applying triple modular redundancy to multi-agent AI coordination state drift detection, using three independent scramblers (ledger verifier, ground-truth verifier, tiebreaker arbiter) paired with three independent activation triggers (mandatory-function-hardwired, time-based cron, event-driven hooks) producing nine verification paths.
composing_primitives: Scrambler B — Ground Truth Verifier (deployed artifacts)
founder_voice_quotes: I want all 3, so that it makes SURE it all happens. Redundant redundancy.

title: Member-Owned Scribes Cathedral as Membership Product
canonical_topic: A cooperative platform membership product provisioning each member a domain-indexed personal working memory (Scribes Cathedral) that grows compoundingly across sessions, is legally member-owned and exportable via standalone reader, bridges R9 retrieval lift to cooperative subscription retention, and enables consent-gated Scribe sharing into collective Guild/Tribe stores.
composing_primitives: Three Fates Routing Pipeline as Session Listener
Retrieval Amplification over Personal Corpus (+19.4pp mean lift)
Export-on-Close with Standalone Reader and Schema Docs
founder_voice_quotes: the Cathedrals shared among LB members would also be a very useful value of constant use of LB — and a HUGE membership incentive, especially for R9.

title: Three Fates Routing Pipeline for AI Session Listeners
canonical_topic: A three-stage routing pipeline (Clotho/spinner for theme extraction, Lachesis/measurer for expertise-level-weighted Scribe scoring, Atropos/cutter for dispatch with coverage-gap detection) connecting LLM session content to domain-specialist storage at O(themes × active-Scribes) cost, enabling Cathedral-scale ingest without per-Scribe scan.
composing_primitives: Atropos — Dispatch with Coverage-Gap Detection and Routing-Record Closure
founder_voice_quotes: Let's make THIS the three Fates that categorize together and invoke the sleeping Scribes that it applies to.

title: Scribes Cathedral: Domain-Indexed Working Memory with Triply-Redundant Witness
canonical_topic: An append-only JSONL-tablet knowledge store organized as a registry of domain Scribes each declaring one primary field and up to 12 adjacent expertise fields, enforcing triply-redundant witness coverage (≥3 Scribes per topic) as an architectural invariant, with O(1) primary-first indexed retrieval and Reed-Solomon-analogue error correction for knowledge.
composing_primitives: Append-Only JSONL Tablet Storage (per-line atomic writes)
Triply-Redundant Witness Invariant (≥3 Scribes per topic)
Primary-First O(1) Indexed Retrieval with Level-Weighted Expansion
Reed-Solomon-Analogue Error Correction for Knowledge Content
